SEARCH
Package com.mycompany.weblab5

Class BlogModel

java.lang.Object
com.mycompany.weblab5.BlogModel
public class BlogModel extends Object
Represents the model component of the blog application. It stores the collection of blog posts and admin mode flag. Handles all business logic: adding, removing, editing posts and file I/O.
Version:
1.3
Author:
Bartosz

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • BlogModel

      public BlogModel()

  • Method Details

    • setFileName

      public void setFileName(String fileName)

    • RandomLetters

      public String RandomLetters() throws BlogException
      Generates a random 5-letter lowercase string used as unique post ID.
      Returns:
      String consisting of 5 random lowercase letters.
      Throws:
      BlogException - if the generated ID does not have length 5.

    • addPost

      public BlogPost addPost(String date, String author, String content) throws BlogException, IOException
      Adds a new blog post to the internal list and writes changes to file.
      Parameters:
      date - date of the post.
      author - author name.
      content - text content of the post.
      Returns:
      the created BlogPost object.
      Throws:
      BlogException - if any field is empty or ID generation fails.
      IOException - if writing to file fails.

    • deletePost

      public void deletePost(int index) throws BlogException, IOException
      Deletes a blog post at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - zero-based index of the post to remove.
      Throws:
      BlogException - if admin mode is disabled or index is invalid.
      IOException - if writing to file fails.

    • deleteAllPosts

      public void deleteAllPosts() throws BlogException, IOException
      Deletes all blog posts.
      Throws:
      BlogException - if admin mode is disabled.
      IOException - if writing to file fails.

    • editPost

      public void editPost(int index, String author, String date, String content) throws BlogException, IOException
      Edits a blog post at a given index.
      Parameters:
      index - zero-based index of the post.
      author - new author name.
      date - new date.
      content - new text content.
      Throws:
      BlogException - if admin mode is disabled, fields are empty, or index invalid.
      IOException - if writing to file fails.

    • getPostCountByAuthor

      public int getPostCountByAuthor(String author)
      Counts how many posts were written by the given author.
      Parameters:
      author - the author to search for.
      Returns:
      number of posts by that author.

    • readFromFile

      public void readFromFile() throws BlogException
      Reads all blog posts from the storage file and loads them into memory.
      Throws:
      BlogException - if ID generation fails.

    • writeToFile

      public void writeToFile() throws IOException
      Writes all blog posts to the storage file.
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing to the file fails.
